name: KathyManning2018.com
subject: Bumping this -- need $18
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
body:
| | Hi there -- It is almost midnight and we're within striking distance of our goal. We need $500 before midnight. **_Will you be the contribution that puts us over edge?_** Use this link: **[www.kathymanning2018.com/RapidResponseFundDonate](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d9/e3b7d3/5de8debf/25551c07/2944614807/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180810b?refcode=kme180810b_m&recurring=true")** It'll only take a few minutes and then you can go enjoy your weekend! Thanks,
Tori _\---------- Forwarded message ----------
From: Tori Taylor
Date: Fri, Aug 10, 2018
Subject: I'll be blunt. I have bad news in this message._ |
---
I'll be blunt. I received some bad news. And now, we have to raise $4,000 by midnight. I'll ask you to contribute to this Rapid Response Fund, but first let me walk you through what's going on.
Let me say, our ground game has been incredible. We've knocked on thousands of doors, made phone calls, and registered voters throughout the district. Kathy has put thousands of miles on her car driving across the district talking with voters about what keeps them up at night. This is the largest grassroots effort North Carolina's 13th District has ever seen. And thanks to the hard work of people like you, this has become one of the most competitive races in the country.
**_But our momentum is in jeopardy._** Here's why:
**The Heritage Action for America, an extreme, conservative Washington special interest group, is investing $400,000 to make sure Kathy isn 't elected.**
[**_Now, I need you to donate $18 to our Rapid Response Fund._**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d9/e3b7d3/5de8debf/25551c06/2944614807/VEsE/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180810b?refcode=kme180810b_m&recurring=true&amount=18")
Make no mistake -- they're targeting Kathy for a reason. The group specifically mentioned that they are targeting races with promising Democratic candidates.
And this investment came shortly after a single-digit poll was released.
They know that as a Congresswoman, Kathy will always represent the families of North Carolina. It would be a huge problem for Heritage Action for America and these other extreme Washington special interest groups if Kathy was elected and they lost their bought-and-sold ally, Rep. Ted Budd.
[**Will you donate to fill our Rapid Response Fund? We are aiming to reach $4,000 by midnight tonight.**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d9/e3b7d3/5de8debf/25551c07/2944614807/VEsF/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180810b?refcode=kme180810b_m&recurring=true")
In a post-_Citizens United_ world, I don't know how many more "bad news" messages I will have to send. But what I do know is that Kathy won't win without your support.
Rush in a contribution by using this link: [**www.kathymanning2018.com/RapidResponse**](https://manning.bsd.net/page/m/654279d9/e3b7d3/5de8debf/25551c07/2944614807/VEsC/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/kme180810b?refcode=kme180810b_m&recurring=true")
Thanks,
Tori
Tori Taylor
Campaign Manager
Kathy Manning for Congress

|
---
| | Paid for by Kathy Manning for Congress
---

name: Team Claire
subject: true cost of the trade war
disclaimer_text: Paid for by McCaskill for Missouri
body:
Friend, real quick –

I've crisscrossed the state to talk with Missouri farmers and manufacturers about how this reckless trade war is affecting them, and let me tell you what they've told me: Enough is enough.

Soybean prices have dropped over 20%. Steel manufacturers' sales have plummeted 50%, causing over 100 workers to lose their jobs at a single company. Missouri could lose $880 million in revenue. All because of the White House's misguided and short-sighted trade war.

Our families are not political bargaining chips. I need you to stand with Missouri families and tell the Trump administration to stop this reckless trade war! Click here to add your name now.

https://petitions.signforgood.com/tradewarJA?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=cmc-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmccaskill-tradewar%3Fcode%3Djtk1257-ja-nd

I'm fighting tooth and nail every day against this disastrous trade war and the threat it represents to the livelihoods of Missourians across the state. It's time to end the uncertainty, the fear and the threat to our families.

My opponent, Josh Hawley? He just wants to "wait and see" what happens.

Friend, listen. Missouri families don't have time to wait and see – they're being hurt now. Which is why I need you to stand with Missourians and families everywhere. Tell President Trump: End this trade war now!

https://petitions.signforgood.com/tradewarJA?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&ask=5&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500&code=cmc-nd&redirect=https%3A%2F%2Fsurveys.signforgood.com%2Fmccaskill-tradewar%3Fcode%3Djtk1257-ja-nd

Thanks,

Claire

[**How Visa ‘Overstays’ are Fueling America’s Immigration Small Businesses subject: Need you on this
disclaimer_text: Paid for by The Way Ahead The Way Ahead
body:
| | |
---
Let me be clear, friends. Untraceable, 3D-printed guns pose a dangerous threat to our community.
The Trump administration gave the green light to the public release of 3D printer blueprints for guns. The move would have allowed basically anyone to make untraceable guns--including AR-15s--from the anonymity of their own home.
Make no mistake: Anyone unable to pass a simple gun background check should not be able to bypass gun safety laws. We have checks and accountability so that no one can walk into a store and then commit violent acts in our community, let alone possess an untraceable weapon.
That's why I'm proud that Virginia joined a lawsuit that has temporarily blocked the release of these blueprints. But without permanent action, these dangerous blueprints could still become widely available. **That's why I need to hear from 5,000 of you by midnight on this urgent question: **
| | **Should we ban 3D-printed guns?**

clean_body: | | nh.gop NH REPUBLICAN PARTY WEEKLY NEWSLETTER FRIDAY, AUGUST 10th | A Note From Wayne Dear Derek, Republicans across New Hampshire are fighting back against a possible "blue wave" by building a red wall. Republicans from Conway through Spofford, Nashua to Rye, and Salem through Colebrook are excited to elect Republicans up and down the ballot this November. We have some great events coming up to help build our New Hampshire Republican infrastructure. For one, our exciting NHGOP Debate for both our competitive Congressional districts is coming up on Thursday, August 16th at Grappone Center in Concord. At the end of the month, we have the Roast of former White House Chief of Staff and Governor John H. Sununu at Castleton in Windham. Many Republican groups and organizations are getting active and ready for the upcoming elections - if you are a member of an organization with an event coming up, We're committed to building a red wall for this November. Sincerely, Wayne MacDonald Join the Grassroots Circle! The Grassroots Circle is a unique way for you to get involved while supporting the Party. Becoming a member couldn't be easier -- join today for as little as $10 per month. There are three levels of support: The Grassroots Supporter, the NHGOP Advocate and the VIP Investor. name: Senator Tina Smith
subject: Join me and my fellow pro-choice Senators to oppose Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Tina Smith for Minnesota
body:
We need a historic grassroots effort to win this fight.

| [](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a243/c1f7015/6aae1530/1141871a/2630484336/VEsH/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-judge-kavanaugh?source=SCOTUSTS&referrer=group-tina-smith-for-minnesota") Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell are attempting to reshape the Supreme Court for a generation and take away a woman's right to choose. We must do everything in our power to stop them. **Join my fellow pro-choice Democratic Senators and add your name here to oppose Brett Kavanaugh's nomination to the Supreme Court.** ****[Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a243/c1f7015/6aae1530/1141871a/2630484336/VEsE/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-judge-kavanaugh?source=SCOTUSTS&referrer=group-tina-smith-for-minnesota")**** Friend, As a former Vice President at Planned Parenthood in Minnesota, I know firsthand the fervor of the anti-choice movement and their desire to do everything in their power to take away a woman's right to safe and legal abortion. **Their side knows confirming Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court is their best chance to overturn _Roe vs. Wade_. **And you can count on this -- they will bring every dollar and ounce of energy they have to make sure he's on the Court to do it. We need a historic grassroots effort to win this fight. **Are you ready to do all you can to win?** [**Join me and my fellow pro-choice Senators to oppose Brett Kavanaugh 's nomination to the Supreme Court. Add your name here:**](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a243/c1f7015/6aae1530/1141871a/2630484336/VEsF/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-judge-kavanaugh?source=SCOTUSTS&referrer=group-tina-smith-for-minnesota") ****[Sign the Petition](https://action.tinaforminnesota.com/page/m/4bc4a243/c1f7015/6aae1530/1141871a/2630484336/VEsC/ "https://actionnetwork.org/forms/oppose-judge-kavanaugh?source=SCOTUSTS&referrer=group-tina-smith-for-minnesota")**** This might be the largest challenge we face in the Trump Presidency, and lives of millions of Americans will change depending on what happens here. We must give it everything we have. Counting on you, Tina Smith

Their side knows confirming Brett Kavanaugh to the Supreme Court is their best chance to overturn Roe vs. Wade. And you can count on this -- they will bring every dollar and ounce of energy they have to make sure he's on the Court to do it. We need a historic grassroots effort to win this fight. Are you ready to do all you can to win? "" ""** This might be the largest challenge we face in the Trump Presidency, and lives of millions of Americans will change depending on what happens here. We must give it everything we have. Counting on you, Tina Smith

name: Peter
subject: on the road again
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Donnelly for Indiana
body:
The RV is back up and running good as new -- or at least as good as a 16-year old RV can! |
---

| | Hey Peter -- Last week, while we were on a seven-day, 40-stop statewide tour talking to Hoosiers with Joe, our 16-year-old Indiana-made RV broke down on the way to Kimmell. Thankfully we weren't stranded long, as a very kind farmer pulled over and offered to take us to our next event!

We didn't miss a beat, but the RV had to stay in the shop for a few days. Now, it's back up and running good as new -- or at least as good as a 16-year-old RV can! | [](http://action.joeforindiana.com/page/m/7f7c2fc8/7377f838/3a6be868/51f85c2e/3252937741/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jd-gas-up-the-rv?refcode=20180811.1&amount=15")

name: Ben Jealous
subject: Courage to Love
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY FRIENDS OF BEN JEALOUS, JASON SMALL, TREASURER
body:
We need to show we're united.

| Friend, It takes courage to love in the face of hate. My parents were forced to leave Maryland when they decided to get married because it was illegal for them to remain here as husband and wife. They got married and decided to defy a society that had told them interracial marriage was wrong, even though it meant they were forced to leave their home and forced to raise their family far away. Tomorrow marks the one-year anniversary of an event where, a few hours away from the Maryland border, white supremacists and Nazis marched in Charlottesville. An innocent woman died and almost twenty others were injured in one of the scariest instances of hate in recent years. For many, it was a painful reminder that the fight for equality and civil rights is far from over. And it was also a call to action. Those same forces are descending on our nation's capital, Washington, D.C., where they plan to hold a "Unite the Right" rally to try and show that bigotry, racism, violence, and hatred are what fuels this country. It always takes courage to defend our values in the face of such ugly forces. The courage my parents had to get married at a time that rejected their union, the courage countless civil rights leaders and activists have had to stand up for a better America, is the same courage we need now. There's a long way to go, but our country needs each and every one of us to step up. This weekend, remember to reflect on the men and women who have fought to give us a brighter future. I know I will. Thanks, Ben | [CHIP IN »](http://act.benjealous.com/page/m/5c37aa88/7ab0e2c4/7fc10950/349b1670/1894378388/VEsH/ "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/benj-fund-fight?refcode=OHQ08118A")

It’s starting to happen:
groups backed by billionaires are preparing to flood Texas with millions
of dollars in negative TV ads attacking Beto and our campaign. This week,
a Ted Cruz super PAC bought $750,000 of ads against Beto.

This is what happens when the polls tighten. Cruz and his backers know
there’s a real chance they’ll lose in November, so they’re going to stop
at nothing to try and drown us out.

this race. Help us fight back and show Beto we’ve got his back with
another contribution of
$3.

Our goal is to raise $750,000 online before this weekend is over to match
the $750,000 this pro-Cruz super PAC plans to spend against Beto. This is
one more steep goal we’re setting for our team, but this team has what it
takes to make it.

Every donation you contribute to our campaign goes directly into voter
contact work on the ground in Texas. We’ve got tens of thousands of
volunteers knocking on doors and making phone calls for Beto -- talking
directly with voters about our campaign to take on Ted Cruz.

Your donations also help us keep Beto on the road, listening to Texans in
every corner of the state.

We don’t know what these new super PAC attack ads are going to say about
Beto or our campaign -- but we do know we need to be ready to fight back
the moment they hit airwaves.

body:
[](https://secure.bobcasey.com/page/m/661e6392/51dbcc2a/1f0637d3/3a97165/3490001011/VEsH/ "https://bobcasey.com/") Hi team --

What a week. My team and I traveled to seven Pennsylvania counties, enjoyed some really perfect peanut butter milkshakes and, most importantly, met and thanked hundreds of excited voters and organizers who are ready to head to the polls in November.

We have a long road ahead of us, but based on what I've seen this week, I'm confident we can make it happen.

We started the week at Old San Juan restaurant in Lancaster, where I had the chance to talk to the local community about the issues at the top of their minds, like immigration and health care. People are worried about their children's futures, and I promised to do all I can to help them.

On Tuesday, we stopped at the Hamilton Health Center in Harrisburg to talk about what's next in the fight for quality, affordable health care. With Congressional Republicans coming after pre-existing conditions, we cannot be complacent. [](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180811_fr1_nd&amounts=5,5,25,50,100,250") On Wednesday, I took a walk around the streets of New Kensington with Mayor Tom Guzzo. I saw a lot of potential -- new businesses are opening and the innovation center is bringing work back to the community. Kevin, one of the founders of the Knead Bread Cafe, where customers pay what they can, truly believes in the community. When you see people that invested in their hometown's success, you can't help but root for them. [](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180811_fr1_nd&amounts=5,5,25,50,100,250") I went to our Coordinated Campaign HQ in Pittsburgh on Thursday, where I had breakfast with regional organizers and volunteers. There's a lot at stake in this election, and I'm excited to work with these dedicated Democrats to help candidates running up and down the ballot. [](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180811_fr1_nd&amounts=5,5,25,50,100,250") We made our way down to Greene County for the fair -- you know I had to sample the dairy farmers' products. I met some great people and made some new friends, like Nalla the lamb. I'm grateful to the community members who took the time to show me around.

I rounded out the week closer to home with a meet-and-greet with the Luzerne County Democrats. Just like their fellow Pennsylvanians on the other side of the state, these voters want to get involved and know how important this election is, not only for us but also for our children and their future.

I want to thank every Pennsylvanian who welcomed me into their community this week. The number of volunteers getting involved in the campaign shows that we are fighting for every vote in all 67 counties. I promise to keep fighting for you and ask that, as we get closer to November, you do the same for me by talking to your friends and neighbors. Tell them what's at stake in this election. Make sure they're registered to vote.

We can elect a team that will work hard for kids, workers, middle-class families, farmers, seniors -- for all of us -- but only if we work together. I'm confident we'll get it done.

Thanks,

Bob [DONATE](https://secure.bobcasey. "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/bob-casey?refcode=em_20180811_fr1_nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500")

We need to elect women up and down the ticket -- from the Senate to state legislatures -- to help protect access to safe and legal abortion.

Mississippi, Louisiana, North Dakota, and South Dakota all have "trigger laws" on the books that would make abortion illegal almost as soon as _Roe_ is overturned.

There are nine states that have pre-_Roe_ abortion bans that could go back into effect if _Roe_ is reversed.

And there are seven states -- including ones that also have trigger laws or pre-_Roe_ bans -- that have laws that express intent to limit abortion if _Roe_ falls.

That's 17 states where access to abortion could be in jeopardy due to the threat of overturning _Roe_.

There's no doubt about it: A Supreme Court filled with Trump appointees is scary.

But we know what we have to do.

We need to elect our women to every level of government so they can protect reproductive rights from antiquated state laws and anti-choice justices.

name: Bob Hugin for Senate
subject: Philadelphia Inquirer: Menendez’s Campaign Chair is Qatar Lobbyist
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Bob Hugin for Senate, Inc
body:
In case you missed it, The Philadelphia Inquirerbroke the story that Bob Menendez’s campaign chairman is a lobbyist for Qatar. | |
---
In case you missed it, [_**The Philadelphia Inquirer** _](http://links.bobhugin.com/u/click?_t=e73291e89afe41a2b14d8f6ad40d5630&_m=ff3df3ed299b41dd81e04c9dd0278785&_e=ROtytbDW8Ozt4r5uvCJ6FWfplbRM2WQIP_1LY6Wz5-f6W8Hu24gA9kqmftT5eGgoampDF8wWiDFDSLqQaMz9-krQ726QcmsTyxpZV1RK9gKEfwTbq8mACe5ekCBYd8pBY5eqsTDSYK3i8IYceFRZ8bln1UD5vztanlwtphpOkZIm48p4w9gF-H9vOWQSqe88IoNNIMrTwsBt4U134Q_YiR8B7qx6i005q17gNlNBD9bs-IEvurSbS5py6uNZe2cqGkNa-nEA_t1W4I7tjUWR5lJOHmQ_Gb9ZdIPCROpxRFAwO_oJ-X25Dpo8Jx-hZB_mw7gCcVR5GumhQ0TqpGlJOE47VDN9nxVCTCYSBI6-4GH5uzg6HADo8mdOotn2fkNiVf5KWhQ50d65uq7vn9HL7KHaLTJJ68H6nPX51txBpA355kQwC1SrzOQi3V3lJEvEo1-nNXqILmn8y-ARttElX0xrq_4g7jhX-jUgtk3yFSA%3D)broke the story that Bob Menendez’s campaign chairman is a lobbyist for Qatar.

* "Michael Soliman is a longtime aide and confidant to Sen. Bob Menendez. Now the New Jersey Democrat's campaign chairman, he naturally wants his boss to win reelection this year."
* "Since 2015, Soliman has also lobbied Menendez and other members of Congress on behalf of the government of Qatar, arranging meetings for the country's ambassador to the U.S. and raising issues important to Qatar's relationship with Washington."

**Conflict of interest?******
**
**
* "Menendez meets regularly with foreign dignitaries, including from Qatar...but some ethics experts say the arrangement poses possible conflicts of interest or the appearance of a conflict."
* "'There is a blurring of lines between responsibility to the candidate and responsibility to their client,’ said Meredith McGehee of the Campaign Legal Center, a nonprofit watchdog in Washington. ‘Very little of that is a responsibility to the public.’"
* "Menendez is seeking a third six-year term after overcoming federal corruption allegations last year. His campaign has paid Soliman's consulting firm $105,000 since 2015."

**Raises concerns.**
**
**
* “He added, ‘It raises some of the same concerns that also led us to prohibit foreign campaign spending.’
* Noah Bookbinder, executive director of Citizens for Responsibility and Ethics in Washington, said that he wasn't aware of any parallel to Soliman's dual roles but that it reflected ‘the kind of cronyism and sort of throwing around of influence that we do see too much of in Washington.’”

**Foreign lobbying.**
**
**
* "Experts who research foreign lobbying said Soliman's arrangement appeared to be similar to one that rocked Sen. John McCain's 2008 presidential campaign."
* "Records show Soliman has discussed legislation with Menendez's chief of staff and asked Foreign Relations Committee staff about such issues."
* "According to a July disclosure, his most recent contact with Menendez's staff came in May, when Soliman worked to arrange a meeting between the senator and the Qatari ambassador."

body:
Friend,
Wanted to loop you into this chain with Erika. We're coming up against our membership deadline and still don't have enough people committed to this campaign. If we want to win in November, we have to turn this around ASAP.
The Washington Post calls this one of the most competitive races in the country and Mitch McConnell's super PAC recently pledged to spend $600,000 to prop up Hawley, so I'm counting on this team to step up. Every single gift matters here because it's how we fight back against the billionaires and dark-money groups and win this tied race.
So please, give $50, $10, $1 - whatever you have - but you've got to donate before midnight to become a member of the Missouri Defenders: [https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr](https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/mccaskill_email_fr?refcode=jtk1215-fr-nd&amounts=5,25,50,100,250,500)
Grateful as ever to be fighting this fight with you.
Claire

name: Nina Turner, Our Revolution
subject: Space Force Poll!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY OUR REVOLUTION
body:
When I heard Vice President Mike Pence announce the so-called "Space Force", my first question was, "Why can't we invest in people in this country, here on planet Earth with the same urgency?"
#
Friends,
When I heard Vice President Mike Pence announce the so-called "Space Force", my first question was, "Why can't we invest in people in this country, here on planet Earth with the same urgency?"
Not long after Pence's announcement, President Trump's campaign reached out to his supporters to choose the new logo. A new logo? Why not reach out to the American people to ask them what keeps them up at night and what policies could be implemented to assist the greatest number of people to obtain a higher standard of living? Instead, this administration continues to play games with our collective futures. So, I'm asking: **what issues matter most to you? What would you like to see our country invest billions of dollars in?**
**[MEDICARE FOR ALL](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a985/bed43eb/7dc98f10/75fc8532/1480561659/VEsH/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey?source=em180811")**
**[COLLEGE FOR ALL](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a985/bed43eb/7dc98f10/75fc8532/1480561659/VEsE/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey?source=em180811")**
**[GREEN NEW DEAL](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a985/bed43eb/7dc98f10/75fc8532/1480561659/VEsF/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey?source=em180811")**
**[INFRASTRUCTURE](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a985/bed43eb/7dc98f10/75fc8532/1480561659/VEsC/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey?source=em180811")**
**[OTHER](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a985/bed43eb/7dc98f10/75fc8532/1480561659/VEsD/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey?source=em180811")**
We can provide a better standard of living for all Americans and secure the future of our country. The focus must be on both--foreign and domestic. And for far too long the equation has been lopsided in ways that disadvantage our families and communities.
Since our tax dollars, our energy, and our spirit fuels America's progress, we have a say in how investments are made. We must speak up together letting our collective voices be heard declaring the type of future we want to create for ourselves and generations unborn.
**Here's the first step:** Tell us the policy you want to see our country invest in: **[https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey](https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/m/2ba7a985/bed43eb/7dc98f10/75fc8532/1480561659/VEsA/ "https://go.ourrevolution.com/page/s/space-force-survey?source=em180811")**
It is possible to secure our country and invest in our communities. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us on how together, we can make this country work for everyday people like you and me.
In solidarity,
Nina Turner
President
Our Revolution

clean_body: When I heard Vice President Mike Pence announce the so-called "Space Force", my first question was, "Why can't we invest in people in this country, here on planet Earth with the same urgency?" Friends, When I heard Vice President Mike Pence announce the so-called "Space Force", my first question was, "Why can't we invest in people in this country, here on planet Earth with the same urgency?" Not long after Pence's announcement, President Trump's campaign reached out to his supporters to choose the new logo. A new logo? Why not reach out to the American people to ask them what keeps them up at night and what policies could be implemented to assist the greatest number of people to obtain a higher standard of living? Instead, this administration continues to play games with our collective futures. So, I'm asking: what issues matter most to you? What would you like to see our country invest billions of dollars in? "" "" "" "" "" We can provide a better standard of living for all Americans and secure the future of our country. The focus must be on both--foreign and domestic. And for far too long the equation has been lopsided in ways that disadvantage our families and communities. Since our tax dollars, our energy, and our spirit fuels America's progress, we have a say in how investments are made. We must speak up together letting our collective voices be heard declaring the type of future we want to create for ourselves and generations unborn. Here's the first step: Tell us the policy you want to see our country invest in: "" It is possible to secure our country and invest in our communities. Thank you for sharing your thoughts with us on how together, we can make this country work for everyday people like you and me. name: Alerts from TimKaine.com
subject: Khizr Khan pledges to reject hate in his community of Charlottesville
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Kaine for Virginia
body:
Mr. Khan - a Gold Star father whose son gave his life to protect others while serving overseas in the U.S. Army - lives in Charlottesville. ------------------------------------------------------------
| | \---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------- [Derek, Khizr Khan took the pledge to reject hate in his community. Will you read his note attached below and sign on to stand with him and Tim Kaine against hate?](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1294/3e0906/6f274d5a/3e351404/1684686814/VEsH/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=1+-+FIRSTNAMEFolks+Khizr+Khan+took+the+pledg&utm_campaign=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS")

Mr. Khan - _a Gold Star father whose son gave his life to protect others while serving overseas in the U.S. Army_ \- lives in Charlottesville. **The hate he saw on display at that rally last year does not represent the city he loves.** _Read his note and sign on below:_ | [**PLEDGE TO REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1294/3e0906/6f274d5a/3e35141b/1684686814/VEsE/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=2+-+PLEDGE+TO+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS")
---

\-------------FORWARDED MESSAGE-------------

FROM: Khizr Khan
SUBJECT: I love Charlottesville
Derek,

**I love Charlottesville.**

My son, Humayun Khan, attended the University of Virginia where he was a member of the Army ROTC program. He believed his time there helped to complete him as a person and so he wanted to give back. This led my son to serve overseas in the U.S. Army, where he showed the highest level of patriotism and bravery that one can show when he lost his life while protecting others.

After my son's death, my wife Ghazala and I moved to Charlottesville to be closer to our other two sons who were there. The community welcomed us with open arms and the university hosted two military ceremonies honoring our son, his service, and our loss.

Ghazala and I became very involved with the Army ROTC at UVA, as a way to honor our son and give back to a group that gave so much to him. It was by being a part of this community and working with these students that we were able to put our roots down in Charlottesville, Virginia.

[But two days from now will mark the one year anniversary of hate showing its face in the streets of Charlottesville, my home. I hope you will join me and add your name to Senator Kaine's pledge to reject hate.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1294/3e0906/6f274d5a/3e35141a/1684686814/VEsF/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=3+-+But+two+days+from+now+will+mark+the+one+&utm_campaign=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS")
[**PLEDGE TO REJECT HATE**](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1294/3e0906/6f274d5a/3e351419/1684686814/VEsC/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=4+-+PLEDGE+TO+REJECT+HATE&utm_campaign=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS")
---
Derek, I promise to do my part to speak out against hate. I will always fight hard against the prejudiced views that disrespect my family, the memory of my son who loved this country, and countless families who call America home.

And I pledge to always fight for an inclusive Charlottesville - one that welcomes all in search of peace with open arms. I will continue to learn from and grow with the community of Charlottesville and to resist the hate we saw here, almost exactly one year ago.

[Senator Kaine and I pledge to reject hate, in all of its forms. Join us and sign the pledge today.](https://secure.timkaine.com/page/m/330f1294/3e0906/6f274d5a/3e351418/1684686814/VEsD/ "https://secure.timkaine.com/page/s/sign-the-reject-hate-pledge?source=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS&utm_medium=email&utm_source=kaine&utm_content=5+-+Senator+Kaine+and+I+pledge+to+reject+hat&utm_campaign=20180811_1_PET_TEAM_Khan-FWD-NS")

With respect,

_Khizr Khan_
